_comment: Single source of truth for consensus-affecting constants whose drift between C++ and Rust would cause silent wrong-output (rather than fail-closed-on-load). Generated into both languages by cmake/generate_consensus_constants.py (C++) and rust/shekyl-engine-core/build.rs (Rust). Hand-maintained values on either side have been deleted and replaced with `static_assert` sentinels against the generated values. Bug class motivated by Bug 3 of the 2026-05-05 FFI constant-drift audit (see docs/audit_trail/2026-05-ffi-constant-drift-audit.md). Adding entries: keep the audit doc's 'Constants confirmed aligned' table in sync with this file.
